translations.hu: Ez a terület le van zárva.
translations.ja: この区域は閉鎖されています。

tokens.explanation: Locative adverb indicating place; sets the scene for the clause.
Copular auxiliary, 3rd person singular present; links the subject to the predicate adjective (state passive reading).
Definite article; nominative singular neuter; determiner of the subject noun.
Neuter noun meaning ‘area/region’; grammatical subject of the clause.
Predicative adjective (Partizip II of ‘sperren’); denotes a blocked/closed state.

sentences.target: Wir wandern durch ein neues Gebiet.

translations.de: Wir wandern durch ein neues Gebiet.
translations.en: We’re hiking through a new area.
translations.es: Estamos haciendo senderismo por una zona nueva.
translations.fr: Nous faisons une randonnée dans une nouvelle région.
translations.it: Stiamo facendo un'escursione in una zona nuova.
translations.ko: 우리는 새로운 지역에서 하이킹을 하고 있어요.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们在一个新的地方徒步。
translations.yue: 我哋喺一個新地方行山。
translations.ru: Мы идём пешком по новой местности.
translations.pt: Estamos fazendo trilha por uma área nova.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi đang đi bộ đường dài ở một khu vực mới.
translations.nl: We wandelen door een nieuw gebied.
translations.uk: Ми йдемо в похід у новій місцевості.
translations.hi: हम एक नए इलाके में पैदल यात्रा कर रहे हैं.
translations.el: Κάνουμε πεζοπορία σε μια νέα περιοχή.
translations.nb: Vi går på tur i et nytt område.
translations.id: Kami sedang mendaki di kawasan baru.
translations.sv: Vi vandrar genom ett nytt område.
translations.cs: Jdeme na túru v nové oblasti.
translations.da: Vi vandrer gennem et nyt område.
translations.ja: 私たちは新しい場所でハイキングしています。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 1st person plural nominative; subject of the sentence.
Finite main verb, 1st person plural present indicative; intransitive motion verb.
Preposition governing the accusative; introduces a prepositional complement.
Indefinite article; accusative singular neuter; determiner of ‘Gebiet’.
Attributive adjective; accusative singular neuter; modifies ‘Gebiet’.
Neuter noun; object of the preposition ‘durch’ (prepositional complement).

sentences.target: Er kennt das Gebiet nicht gut.

translations.de: Er kennt das Gebiet nicht gut.
translations.en: He doesn’t know the area well.
translations.fr: Il ne connaît pas bien le quartier.
translations.pt: Ele não conhece bem a região.
translations.he: הוא לא מכיר את האזור טוב.
translations.vi: Anh ấy không rành khu vực này.
translations.nl: Hij kent de buurt niet goed.
translations.hi: वह इस इलाके को अच्छी तरह नहीं जानता.
translations.nb: Han kjenner ikke området så godt.
translations.id: Dia tidak begitu mengenal daerah ini.
translations.sv: Han känner inte till området så bra.
translations.da: Han kender ikke området særlig godt.
translations.fi: Hän ei tunne aluetta kovin hyvin.
translations.ja: 彼はこの辺りをよく知りません。

tokens.explanation: Personal pronoun, 3rd person singular nominative; subject.
Transitive verb, 3rd person singular present indicative; selects an accusative object.
Definite article; accusative singular neuter; determiner of the direct object.
Neuter noun; direct object (accusative) of ‘kennt’.
Negation particle; negates the predicate.
Adverb of manner; modifies the verb (how he knows it).

sentences.target: In diesem Gebiet gibt es viele Cafés.
sentences.reading: /ɪn ˈdiːzəm gəˈbiːt gɪpt ɛs ˈfiːlə kaˈfeːs/

translations.de: In diesem Gebiet gibt es viele Cafés.
translations.ipa: /ɪn ˈdiːzəm gəˈbiːt gɪpt ɛs ˈfiːlə kaˈfeːs/
translations.en: There are many cafés in this area.
translations.es: En esta zona hay muchas cafeterías.
translations.fr: Il y a beaucoup de cafés dans ce quartier.
translations.it: In questa zona ci sono molti caffè.
translations.he: יש הרבה בתי קפה באזור הזה.
translations.vi: Khu vực này có nhiều quán cà phê.
translations.ar: هناك الكثير من المقاهي في هذه المنطقة.
translations.nl: In deze buurt sąn veel cafés.
translations.hu: Ebben a környéken sok kávézó van.
translations.hi: इस इलाके में बहुत सारे कैफ़े हैं.
translations.pl: W tej okolicy jest wiele kawiarni.
translations.el: Στην περιοχή αυτή υπάρχουν πολλά καφέ.
translations.nb: Det er mange kafeer i dette området.
translations.id: Di area ini ada banyak kafe.
translations.sv: Det finns många kaféer i det här området.
translations.ro: În această zonă sunt multe cafenele.
translations.cs: V této oblasti je hodně kaváren.
translations.da: Der er mange caféer i dette område.
translations.ja: この辺りにはカフェがたくさんあります。

tokens.explanation: Preposition; here with dative; introduces a locative prepositional phrase.
Demonstrative determiner; dative singular neuter; agrees with ‘Gebiet’ under ‘in’.
Neuter noun; object of the preposition ‘in’; head of the PP marking location.
Finite verb, 3rd person singular present; used in existential construction ‘es gibt’ (‘there is/are’).
Impersonal pronoun; expletive subject in the existential ‘es gibt’ construction.
Quantifying determiner; modifies the plural noun ‘Cafés’.
Plural noun; accusative direct object of ‘gibt’ in the existential construction.
